column1: UPDATE `t_product` SET `stock` = ( `t_product` . `stock` - ? ) , `update_time` = NOW ( ) , `version` = ( `t_product` . `version` + ? ) WHERE `t_product` . `id` = ? AND `t_product` . `status` = ? AND `t_product` . `stock` >= ?

SELECT `t_product` . `id` AS `t_product_id` , `t_product` . `product_name` AS `t_product_product_name` , `t_product` . `product_code` AS `t_product_product_code` , `t_product` . `price` AS `t_product_price` , `t_product` . `stock` AS `t_product_stock` , `t_product` . `category` AS `t_product_category` , `t_product` . `status` AS `t_product_status` , `t_product` . `create_time` AS `t_product_create_time` , `t_product` . `update_time` AS `t_product_update_time` , `t_product` . `version` AS `t_product_version` FROM `t_product` WHERE `t_product` . `id` = ?

SELECT `ooe1_0` . `id` , `ooe1_0` . `attempt_count` , `ooe1_0` . `create_time` , `ooe1_0` . `last_error` , `ooe1_0` . `message_id` , `ooe1_0` . `payload_json` , `ooe1_0` . `published_at` , `ooe1_0` . `routing_key` , `ooe1_0` . `status` , `ooe1_0` . `update_time` FROM `t_order_outbox` `ooe1_0` WHERE `ooe1_0` . `status` = ? ORDER BY `ooe1_0` . `id` LIMIT ?

SELECT `oe1_0` . `id` , `oe1_0` . `approve_time` , `oe1_0` . `cancel_time` , `oe1_0` . `complete_time` , `oe1_0` . `create_time` , `oe1_0` . `discount_amount` , `oe1_0` . `expected_delivery_time` , `oe1_0` . `final_amount` , `oe1_0` . `order_no` , `oe1_0` . `origin_amount` , `oe1_0` . `payment_time` , `oe1_0` . `product_id` , `oe1_0` . `quantity` , `oe1_0` . `refund_time` , `oe1_0` . `reject_reason` , `oe1_0` . `request_no` , `oe1_0` . `ship_time` , `oe1_0` . `status` , `oe1_0` . `total_amount` , `oe1_0` . `update_time` , `oe1_0` . `user_id` , `oe1_0` . `version` FROM `t_order` `oe1_0` WHERE `oe1_0` . `user_id` = ? ORDER BY `oe1_0` . `create_time` DESC , `oe1_0` . `id` DESC LIMIT ?

SELECT `oe1_0` . `id` , `oe1_0` . `approve_time` , `oe1_0` . `cancel_time` , `oe1_0` . `complete_time` , `oe1_0` . `create_time` , `oe1_0` . `discount_amount` , `oe1_0` . `expected_delivery_time` , `oe1_0` . `final_amount` , `oe1_0` . `order_no` , `oe1_0` . `origin_amount` , `oe1_0` . `payment_time` , `oe1_0` . `product_id` , `oe1_0` . `quantity` , `oe1_0` . `refund_time` , `oe1_0` . `reject_reason` , `oe1_0` . `request_no` , `oe1_0` . `ship_time` , `oe1_0` . `status` , `oe1_0` . `total_amount` , `oe1_0` . `update_time` , `oe1_0` . `user_id` , `oe1_0` . `version` FROM `t_order` `oe1_0` ORDER BY `oe1_0` . `create_time` DESC , `oe1_0` . `id` DESC LIMIT ?, ...

SELECT @@SESSION . `auto_increment_increment` AS `auto_increment_increment` , @@`character_set_client` AS `character_set_client` , @@`character_set_connection` AS `character_set_connection` , @@`character_set_results` AS `character_set_results` , @@`character_set_server` AS `character_set_server` , @@`collation_server` AS `collation_server` , @@`collation_connection` AS `collation_connection` , @@`init_connect` AS `init_connect` , @@`interactive_timeout` AS `interactive_timeout` , @@`license` AS `license` , @@`lower_case_table_names` AS `lower_case_table_names` , @@`max_allowed_packet` AS `max_allowed_packet` , @@`net_write_timeout` AS `net_write_timeout` , @@`performance_schema` AS `performance_schema` , @@`sql_mode` AS `sql_mode` , @@`system_time_zone` AS `system_time_zone` , @@`time_zone` AS `time_zone` , @@`transaction_isolation` AS `transaction_isolation` , @@`wait_timeout` AS `wait_timeout`

SELECT `t_user` . `id` AS `t_user_id` , `t_user` . `userno` AS `t_user_userno` , `t_user` . `username` AS `t_user_username` , `t_user` . `password` AS `t_user_password` , `t_user` . `nickname` AS `t_user_nickname` , `t_user` . `phone` AS `t_user_phone` , `t_user` . `email` AS `t_user_email` , `t_user` . `role` AS `t_user_role` , `t_user` . `create_time` AS `t_user_create_time` , `t_user` . `update_time` AS `t_user_update_time` , `t_user` . `login_enabled` AS `t_user_login_enabled` , `t_user` . `version` AS `t_user_version` FROM `t_user` WHERE `t_user` . `username` = ?
